# Test Fixtures

These images correspond to the evaluation suite required by `scripts/generate_test_report.py`.
Please place sample images in this directory to tune the passive spoofing algorithms effectively.

Recommended samples:
- `live.jpg`: Genuine person in front of webcam.
- `print_attack.jpg`: High-resolution printed photo on A4 paper.
- `screen_replay.jpg`: Displaying a video/face on a mobile device to the webcam.
- `mask.jpg`: (Optional) 3D silicone mask if depth validation is turned on.
